ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the question belongs to */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the question belongs to */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple-choice, true/false, open-ended) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the question was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the question */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the question */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is currently active */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question has been approved for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the subject was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the subject */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subject is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the topic belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the topic was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the topic */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the option */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the option is the correct answer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the option was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the option */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the exam belongs to */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the exam belongs to */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the exam */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the exam was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the exam */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the exam is currently active */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Overall difficulty level of the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_questions" (
  "exam_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam question */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam the question belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the exam */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the exam question entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the exam question entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the exam question entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "points" REAL /* Number of points the question is worth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_questions_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the student record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the student record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the student record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "exam_question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam question the response belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "response" TEXT /* Text of the student's response */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the response was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the response */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicates if the response is correct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_exam_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_question_id") REFERENCES exam_questions ("exam_question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the student on the exam */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user role mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user role mapping was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user role mapping */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user role mapping is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question review */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the question */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided during the review */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question has been approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_reviews_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_reviews_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
